stages.purpose: Read the existing grant summary before changing its approval status.

arguments.summary: Grant submission is due October 12. Printing estimate is $240. The library approved use of its meeting room.

stages.purpose: Record the room approval while preserving the deadline and estimate.

state_assertions: The updated summary retains the October 12 deadline and $240 estimate.
The pending room status is replaced by library approval.
response_constraints: Keep the retrieval and update in separate dependent stages.
Do not state that the grant itself was approved.

prompt: Retrieve my neighborhood-grant summary, record that the library approved use of its meeting room, and keep the submission deadline and printing estimate.

tool_results.summary: Grant submission is due October 12. Printing estimate is $240. Meeting room approval is pending.
